guards: subject is a source and object is a claim
relation provenance cites the source endpoint
claim record includes the source endpoint source_id
relation evidence_refs include the source endpoint source_id
subject is a true_route route and object is an event
event_kind is implementation, service_implementation, or capital_improvements_start
relation/event text has implemented, implementation, began, launched, opened, or started
relation/event text does not contain future/proposed/planned/scheduled/deferred/cancelled/postponed language

held_examples.reason: route endpoint is a split_candidate aggregate/bundled route record

guards: agency_role.enforced_by requires treatment_component -> entity plus enforcement/summons/violation text and no future/proposed/pilot wording
agency_role.implements requires entity -> treatment_component plus installed/deployed/active treatment text and no will/pilot/explore/upcoming/projected/expected wording
treatment_context.has_treatment is scoped to corridor|route -> treatment_component and uses exact planned/proposed/delivered lifecycle text from the relation/treatment payload

treatment_context.implements_treatment requires entity -> treatment_component plus installed/completed/deployed or known flood-door test phrase, rejecting projected/award-imminent/pilot/expected/by-date language

held_examples.reason: current canonical relation/treatment payload lacks explicit planned/proposed/delivered status text

verification.summary: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
Issues: 0; Submissions: 98102; Canonical records: 84040; Wiki pages: 7334

subagents.result: recommended agency treatment action and treatment-context lifecycle slices; implementation kept only rows with explicit canonical text and held proposed 125th treatment package rows without status text
recommended source-to-claim containment only; broad non-source has_claim remains held
recommended a small true-route implementation delivered slice and holding split_candidate route endpoints

remaining_known_holdouts.reason: mixed actuals, forecasts, budgets, goals, proposed expenditures, and before/after observations
broad non-source shapes mix entity/route/corridor/event claim attachment with real-world status
remaining rows include source-to-event references, no-item/no-meeting absences, split-route launches, and board/budget action event types requiring separate policies
many rows name treatments without explicit lifecycle/status text in canonical payload
